module:
Repository processing service module.

This module provides functions for processing Git repositories and storing
their commits, branches, and file changes in the database. It serves as a
single source of truth for repository processing logic used by both the
web interface and management commands.

process_repository.docstring:
Process Git repository and store commits in the database.
    This function encapsulates the core logic from fetch_commits view.
    
    Args:
        repository: Repository model instance
        branch_name: Optional branch name to restrict processing
        commit_limit: Optional limit on commits to process per branch
        
    Returns:
        dict: Statistics about processed data
